content: Just deployed my first full-stack app to production. The feeling when the build passes is unmatched!
Anyone else find CSS Grid way more intuitive than Flexbox once it finally clicks?
Refactored 400 lines down to 120 with a custom hook. Small win but I'll take it.
Reminder to future me: always check your .env is in .gitignore BEFORE you commit.
MongoDB aggregation pipelines are basically their own programming language at this point.
Finally understand the difference between useMemo and useCallback. Took way too long.
Started learning TypeScript this week. My JavaScript brain is fighting me every step of the way.
